name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: feature
assignees: ''
---

## Prerequisites

- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md) guidelines
- [ ] I have read the "What We Won't Accept" section
- [ ] I have checked existing issues/PRs for this feature

## Problem Statement

A clear description of the problem you're trying to solve.

## Proposed Solution

How you think this should work.

## API Impact

- [ ] This requires **new API calls** to FranklinWH cloud
- [ ] This modifies **existing API calls**
- [ ] This is **client-side only** (no new API calls)

If new API calls are needed, specify the endpoint(s) if known:
- 

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches you've thought about and why they don't work.

## Additional Context

Any other context, mockups, or examples.
